biography: Rasmus, a familiar name at Vihti Golf Club, is known for his analytical approach to the game. Though seemingly reserved, those who know him well speak of his dry wit and unwavering determination on the course.

Rasmus has graced the Hector Trophée on one occasion, bringing his sharp mind and strategic play to the competition. While the coveted Hector Trophée and Victor Trophy have eluded him thus far, his presence is always noted.

Currently considered retired from Hector Trophée events, the possibility of a return is always open. Golf enthusiasts remember Rasmus for his dedication to the sport, hoping to see him on the course again.
